title: [release-1.43] Add new CI github actions CI to this branch
body:
#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Enable full proper CI infrastructure on the branch so we can safely do more release knowing everything works.

Backports of:
- #6884
- #6889
- c4c020d
- #6911
- #6912 (skipped the lint fix)
- #6918
- 67873033d2865a436b6c159daef8e417c0c65b9e
- 2e2bf30aadb51554e2ac0e8aeaf3af7958bbc98c
- 8d6f3fcf126ba4c1ae75abeec4f6c04e9ced97ac
- 88441f4439e6fdda4bfd141349299a21e54621ca
- 610a22be17de7547b400fb3a5f805a7fbaa70131

Lint update is required as the old lint version is not compatible with our current go version. 

#### How to verify it

see CI result

comments.body:
Ok took a bit longer as I needed to cherry-pick more fixes to make all test pass and had a lot of minor git conflicts to solve but now it seems happy

cc @nalind @TomSweeneyRedHat @timcoding1988
